content: Always show PAR trend direction, not just current level
Always extract facility terms from source legal documents before relying on hardcoded defaults — document review revealed 6 significant discrepancies for Klaim
EoD rules vary per covenant — single breach vs consecutive breach thresholds must be documented per facility agreement

Denominator discipline: every metric must explicitly declare its denominator as total (all originated), active (currently outstanding), or eligible (passing facility criteria). Mixing denominators across comparisons produces misleading ratios. See ANALYSIS_FRAMEWORK.md Section 6.

Separation Principle: split the portfolio into clean (active + normally completed) and loss (default threshold breached) before computing performance metrics. Clean portfolio drives performance metrics (collection rate, DSO, margins); loss portfolio drives attribution analysis (loss waterfall, recovery, categorization). Prevents write-off deals from distorting healthy portfolio metrics.

Completed-only margins for returns analysis. All margin calculations (portfolio margin, monthly margins, discount band margins, new vs repeat margins) must use completed deals only. Including active deals penalises recent vintages that are still collecting and produces artificially depressed margin figures.

Outstanding-based metrics for ageing and health analysis, not face value. Outstanding = Purchase Value - Collected - Denied (clipped at 0). Face value overstates risk exposure by including already-collected amounts. Klaim example: AED 50.4M actual outstanding risk vs AED 198.6M misleading face value.

Three clocks framework: every asset class must declare which clock drives its delinquency definition. (1) Origination age = days since deal date, (2) Contractual DPD = days past contractual due date, (3) Operational delay = days past expected collection timeline. New companies must map their delinquency metric to one of these clocks at onboarding. See ANALYSIS_FRAMEWORK.md Section 7.

Column availability drives feature visibility with graceful degradation. When a tape lacks required columns for a feature, return available: False and hide the section entirely in the frontend. Never estimate or placeholder missing data. Exception: Option C empirical benchmarks from completed deals, explicitly labeled as Derived.
